sourceTitle: Guide for students: best practice when using Generative AI
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Generative AI may be explicitly limited in some courses and actively encouraged in others. You should look first at class summaries and assessment outlines for any AI requirements in the course.
evidenceLocator: Section: FAQs - Can I use Generative AI for my assessment?
